data.description: Replace the single demo video on the home page architecture voice section with a horizontally scrollable series of video clips. Scroll left to reveal clips coming from the right. Use the same clips and clip order from the architecture voice portfolio page. Keep the riso thumbnail cover and hover-to-play interaction.
data.title: Improve arch voice home page demo video — horizontal scroll clip series

data.body:
REVIEW PASS — Implementation matches all plan acceptance criteria.

Checklist:
- [x] Section 5 shows horizontal strip of 8 video clips in correct order (c18, c03, c06, c07, c08, c10, c13, c21)
- [x] Horizontal scroll works (overflow-x-auto, scrollbar-hide, flex-shrink-0 items)
- [x] Riso-filtered thumbnail at rest (grayscale backdropFilter + spruce green multiply tint + grain-texture)
- [x] Hover fades riso overlay (300ms transition) and plays video
- [x] Mouse leave pauses video and restores riso filter
- [x] Touch: tap toggles play/pause via onClick handler (same pattern as HoverVideo.tsx)
- [x] Consistent height (80vh per clip, object-contain preserves aspect ratio), no layout shift
- [x] MergeVideo removed from home page import and usage; component file left in codebase

Minor notes (not blocking):
1. Accessibility: interactive clip items lack role="button" and aria-label — same as HoverVideo pattern, acceptable for now
2. video.play() returns a Promise; rapid hover/unhover could cause a benign DOMException — mitigable with .play().catch(() => {}) if it ever manifests
3. backdropFilter has good modern browser support but is GPU-composited — minimal perf impact since overlays are mostly static
4. No new type errors or build regressions; pre-existing vitest/eslint issues are unrelated

Code is clean, well-structured, follows project conventions.
